title: quercus cocciferoides
intro: Quercus cocciferoides, also known as the Chinese cork tree, is a deciduous tree species native to China. The medicinal properties of Quercus cocciferoides lie in its bark, which contains various bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus cocciferoides include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an anti-diarrheal agent, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Quercus cocciferoides include tea and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
